User.title: User
User.description: User profile with gamified statistics and quick profile setup preferences

username.description: The user's full name from Google Auth or manually refined name

photoURL.description: The user's Google Auth profile avatar URL

yearOfStudy.description: Current year of study at the college

level.description: Gamified Title based on XP limits

problemsSolved.description: Count of successfully solved design cycles

ideasGenerated.description: Count of ideas generated inside the simulation

prototypesBuilt.description: Count of simulated visual prototypes designed

isOnboarded.description: Indicates if the interactive quick onboarding page is completed

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this user record was registered

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this user record was updated

users/{userId}.description: Single-source profile mapping for persistent simulation status
